creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I got this notification:

Port                                            | Current version | New version
------------------------------------------------+-----------------+------------
mail/mailpile                                   | 0.5.2           | gunsmoke--thelastapachetag

0.5.2 was released Aug 9, 2015
Gunsmoke--TheLastApacheTag was released Jul 1, 2015

So it detected the wrong version for some reason.
